title: cleomella arborea
intro: Cleomella arborea, also known as Cleome gynandra, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where the leaves are used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cleomella arborea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Cleomella arborea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, ointments, and creams for topical application.
